# MEOK 30-min Founder Scoping Call

> £29/slot · 50% off with LAUNCH50 (first 100)

## What's the offer

- 30-min video call with Nick Templeman (founder, MEOK AI Labs)
- Live walkthrough of the MEOK audit pipeline
- 4-page scoping checklist post-call
- Free access to meok-attestation-verify offline tool
- Article 50 risk classification for your stack

## What we cover

- Whether your AI is in scope of EU AI Act Article 50
- Which of the 4 obligations apply
- Which of the 4 timing traps you're at
- £4,950 audit vs Big-4 £40-80K
- Your specific stack — 5 questions, 5 minutes, actionable answer

## Slots (week of 16-22 Jun 2026)

- Tue 16 Jun 14:00 BST
- Thu 18 Jun 11:00 BST
- Mon 22 Jun 15:00 BST
- Wed 24 Jun 09:30 BST

## How to book

Click "Book" next to slot. Email pre-filled, reply to confirm. Nick sends Meet/Zoom link 24h before.

## Code
LAUNCH50 = 50% off (first 100)
